title: The Cartographer of Last Things
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a near-future where every object degrades into atoms within 48 hours of manufacture, a federal cartographer who maps the ghost-grid of vanished cities discovers a buried vault whose contents have not decayed for 200 years.
long_description: In a near-future where every object degrades into atoms within 48 hours of manufacture, a federal cartographer who maps the ghost-grid of vanished cities discovers a buried vault whose contents have not decayed for 200 years.
